name: 蔷薇馆
description: 位于宁波四明山断崖上的古老西洋建筑，七十年前由英国人建造，后被罗家买下作为别墅。三层结构，一层有大厅、厨房、餐厅，二层有主卧室、书房、客房，三层有陈列室、客房、书库。

visual.prompt: 1914 Western-style villa on Chinese mountain cliff, stone walls, stormy sky, oil painting style, dramatic lighting

name: 一层
description: 蔷薇馆一层，有大厅、厨房、餐厅、男仆房、女仆房。正门和西侧门通向外面。

visual.prompt: 1914 mansion first floor, grand hall, oil painting style, warm candlelight

name: 二层
description: 蔷薇馆二层，有主卧室、书房、客房。轮椅梯通向一层。

visual.prompt: 1914 mansion second floor, bedroom, study, oil painting style, dim candlelight

name: 三层
description: 蔷薇馆三层，有陈列室、客房、书库。时钟会在整点响起。

visual.prompt: 1914 mansion third floor, exhibition room, oil painting style, mysterious atmosphere

name: 陈列室
description: 三层陈列室，有四个雕像、火铳柜子、屏风。阳台可以悬挂旗帜。罗亨理的尸体在此被发现。

visual.prompt: 1914 mansion exhibition room, statues, muskets, oil painting style, dramatic lighting

name: 地下密室
description: 水池旁的地下通道，有祭坛、蜡状固体、装有白磷的玻璃瓶。阿晴的尸体曾在此处。

visual.prompt: 1914 mansion underground chamber, altar, mysterious symbols, oil painting style, eerie atmosphere

name: 花园
description: 蔷薇馆外的花园，花草肆意生长。太太每天会被推来这里散步。

visual.prompt: 1914 mansion garden, overgrown flowers, mountain backdrop, oil painting style, stormy sky
